choose.when: AND attend_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY) AND DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY)

mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.user_id, up.name AS member_name, up.gender, a.type, a.attend_date, a.check_in_time FROM attendance a JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id
ORDER BY a.attend_date DESC, a.check_in_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.user_id, up.name AS member_name, up.gender, a.type, a.attend_date, a.check_in_time FROM attendance a JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id WHERE a.id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (user_id, type, attend_date, check_in_time) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{type}, #{attendDate}, #{checkInTime})
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.user_id, up.name AS member_name, f.freeze_start, f.freeze_end, f.reason, f.created_at FROM member_freeze f JOIN users u ON f.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id WHERE #{date} BETWEEN f.freeze_start AND f.freeze_end ORDER BY up.name ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS frozen, SUM(CASE WHEN up.gender='남자' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS frozenMale, SUM(CASE WHEN up.gender='여자' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS frozenFemale FROM member_freeze f JOIN users u ON f.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id WHERE #{date} BETWEEN f.freeze_start AND f.freeze_end
SELECT attend_date AS date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM attendance WHERE attend_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY attend_date ORDER BY attend_date ASC
